what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: No body content beyond YAML frontmatter
standouts: Typed reference to a board item rather than embedded content
concerns: No content payload; usefulness depends on target existence and resolution
notes: A thin, timestamped pointer from a channel to a board item, with no embedded payload.
questions: What content or state does the referenced board item hold?
How is the board:// URI resolved in this system?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a board_items attachment and it is exactly a typed reference to a board item; matches.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record associating a channel with a specific board item for retrieval or audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the attachment target.
contribution: Provides a minimal, typed, timestamped edge between a channel and a board item that a fused system can use to reconstruct link topology.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment file that records a board_items link from the dragnet-development channel to board item item-5cfc62a8 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a channel-to-board-item reference for lookup, audit, or cross-referencing.
